page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external storage options and providing a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a moderate single-core capability, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and gzip compression single-threaded tests scoring in the average range. However, multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics show limitations, with stress-ng multi-core and large-block memory read bandwidth falling into the weak category. The processor supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and cryptography acceleration like AES and SHA_NI, which helps maintain average performance in encryption tests and small-model LLM inference tasks.

From a resource density perspective, this instance offers a cost-efficient entry point for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local disk storage. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing power, though multi-threaded scaling is constrained as shown by the poor bzip3 multi-threaded decompression results. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, single-threaded batch processing, and basic computational tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, offering a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Benchmark data shows average single-core CPU performance and encryption capabilities, alongside weak multi-core and memory bandwidth results. The instance supports AVX-512 and SHA_NI instruction sets, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for dedicated compute workloads with low memory requirements. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, single-threaded batch processing, and basic computational tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for lightweight dedicated compute workloads.

tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized instance featuring Intel Xeon processors, tailored for workloads requiring consistent single-core performance and low memory footprints.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors at 2.7 GHz
8.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the base configuration
Supports AVX-512 and SHA_NI hardware acceleration flags
Suited for lightweight web serving and single-threaded batch processing
